name: Braem Park Move Forward Pickleball Complex
description: Seating and covered shelter available. Wind breaks and paddle holders installed in Spring for seasonal play.

name: Marshfield Clinic Health System YMCA
description: Marshfield Clinic Health System YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Marshfield, WI. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Marshfield High School
description: Marshfield High School is a place to play pickleball in Marshfield, WI. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include water. The courts are free.

name: Marshfield Middle School
description: Marshfield Middle School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Marshfield, WI. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Oak Avenue Community Center
description: Oak Avenue Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Marshfield, WI. There are 6 courts. 4 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: South Wood County YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at South Wood County YMCA in Wisconsin Rapids, WI! There are 5 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and locker rooms. You can reserve the courts.

name: Steve J Miller Recreation Area
description: Steve J Miller Recreation Area is a place to play pickleball in Marshfield, WI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Wisconsin Rapids Recreation Complex
description: Wisconsin Rapids Recreation Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wisconsin Rapids, WI. There are 6 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts are free.
